name: Cheese Fingers
recipeIngredient: 3 loaves Bread, white, day-old, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the eggs, milk, and cayenne (if using) and whisk together.
2. Melt the margarine in another bowl and set aside.
3. Dip one slice of bread into the egg mixture, then place it between two slices of dry bread.
4. If desired, freeze at this point.
5. If frozen, thaw for 15 minutes.
6. Slice into 4 fingers.
7. Dip each finger in melted margarine, then coat with Parmesan on top only.
8. Place the coated fingers on a lined baking sheet and repeat.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes until crispy.
Makes 80 pieces.
